item.title: PrusaSlicer
item.description: PrusaSlicer takes 3D models (STL, OBJ, AMF) and converts them into G-code instructions for FFF printers or PNG layers for mSLA 3D printers

item.title: qBittorrent-Enhanced-Edition
item.description: qBittorrent is a bittorrent client programmed in C++ / Qt

item.title: Apache NetBeans
item.description: Apache NetBeans is an open source development environment, tooling platform, and application framework.

item.title: GitHub Desktop
item.description: Fork of GitHub Desktop to support various Linux distributions

item.title: Figma-Linux
item.description: Figma is the first interface design tool based in the browser, making it easier for teams to create software
